notes: Marulan Creek Bridge — GOOD condition. No restrictions. First significant crossing southbound.
Goulburn River Bridge — FAIR condition. Mass posting applies. Scour monitoring in place.
Jugiong Creek Bridge — POOR condition. 1952 arch structure. Limiting asset on this route — permit required for oversize movements.
Clarence River Bridge — GOOD condition. M1600 design load. Principal crossing on Pacific Highway route.
Marulan Creek Bridge — included in HML grain corridor preliminary assessment.
Clarence River Bridge — coastal link section of proposed HML grain corridor.
